spec.title: MV/MZ fixture-key validation from System.json and image evidence

humanSummary.text: The repaired RPG Maker MV/MZ fixture-key validation now fails closed when encrypted image evidence is missing or unreadable, validates readable image evidence before success, and keeps key material redacted. No P0/P1 findings remain. One non-blocking CLI key-import parity follow-up remains.

findings.title: RPG Maker fixture key import format parity
findings.description: The CLI key import path stores decoded bytes for --key-hex, while RPG Maker fixture-key validation resolves local key material as UTF-8 hex text and decodes it again. Direct fixture-key validation is correct, but a normal CLI import followed by validation can fail with BadKey:secretRef.

evidence.detail: Re-audit compared the CLI import path with RpgMakerAssetKey resolution and found a format mismatch between decoded stored bytes and expected UTF-8 hex material.
cargo test -p kaifuu-core rpg_maker; cargo test -p kaifuu-cli rpg_maker; pnpm exec node fixtures/validate-public-manifests.mjs

findings.impact: A user following the natural CLI workflow could import a fixture-safe RPG Maker key and then see validation fail even though the underlying key and image evidence are valid.
actionableAcceptanceCriteria: A key imported with `kaifuu key import --key-hex` can be used by `kaifuu rpg-maker validate-fixture-key` without BadKey:secretRef.
The key store and RPG Maker key resolver share a documented local-only material format or explicit typed conversion boundary.
A CLI regression covers import-then-validate for fixture-safe RPG Maker evidence without logging raw key material.

proposedDagNode.title: RPG Maker CLI key import validation parity
proposedDagNode.summary: Align the CLI key import material format with RPG Maker fixture-key validation so the normal local key-import workflow validates fixture-safe encrypted evidence.
deliverables: Shared typed conversion boundary for imported key material and RPG Maker fixture-key resolution
CLI import-then-validate regression for fixture-safe RPG Maker encrypted image evidence
acceptanceCriteria: `kaifuu key import --key-hex` followed by `kaifuu rpg-maker validate-fixture-key` succeeds for a valid recorded fixture key and encrypted image evidence.
Invalid imported key material still fails closed with redacted errors.
No raw key material is printed in logs, diagnostics, snapshots, or public fixtures.
auditFocus: Import and resolver material format parity
Safe redaction of local-only key material
Fixture-safe encrypted image evidence remains public
